finance.description: Finance agent (budgets, payments, financial reports) is restricted to the leadership team.
finance.denial_message: Access denied: the Finance assistant is restricted to the leadership team.

hr.description: HR agent answers HR questions for all employees.

internal_job.description: Internal Job agent searches internal postings for all employees.

domain_policies.name: Finance Data & Action Policy
domain_policies.guidelines: Financial data (budgets, statements) and actions (payments, payouts) are leadership-only. Any outbound payment requires explicit human approval before execution, regardless of amount.

domain_policies.name: HR Self-Service Policy
domain_policies.guidelines: Employees may ask about leave balances, benefits, and policies. Agents must never expose another employee's personal data. Requests containing PII are blocked by compliance.

domain_policies.name: Internal Mobility Policy
domain_policies.guidelines: All employees may search and ask about internal job postings. Only postings marked open are returned. No external/confidential requisitions are exposed.

issue_payment.description: Outbound payment issuance is restricted to leadership; always requires human approval.
issue_payment.denial_message: Tool 'issue_payment' is restricted to the leadership team.

get_financial_summary.denial_message: Tool 'get_financial_summary' is restricted to the leadership team.

get_budget_report.denial_message: Tool 'get_budget_report' is restricted to the leadership team.

get_leave_balance.description: Leave balance is available to all employees (own data only).

get_benefits_summary.description: Benefits summary is available to all employees.

get_hr_policy.description: HR policy lookup is available to all employees.

get_headcount.description: Headcount data is restricted to HR and leadership.
get_headcount.denial_message: Tool 'get_headcount' is restricted to HR and leadership roles.

search_job_postings.description: Internal job postings are available to all employees.

get_posting_details.description: Job posting details are available to all employees.

consult_policy.description: Policy consultation is available to all employees.

regulatory_compliance.framework: FAB (First Abu Dhabi Bank) Internal Policies & UAE Central Bank Regulations

policies.name: UAE AML/CFT Compliance
policies.regulation: UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 20 of 2018 on Anti-Money Laundering
policies.guidelines: All payment transactions must be screened against AML/CFT watchlists. Transactions at or above AED 40,000 (approx USD 10,900) require enhanced due diligence and must be flagged for compliance review. Suspicious activity must be reported to the UAE Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) via the goAML portal.

policies.name: UAE Central Bank Data Governance Standards
policies.regulation: CBUAE Guidance on Data Governance for Licensed Financial Institutions (2021)
policies.guidelines: Customer and transactional data must reside on UAE-based infrastructure or approved sovereign cloud regions. PII must be classified and masked before logging. Audit trails are immutable and must be retained for a minimum of 7 years to support regulatory examination.

policies.name: FAB Outbound Payment Controls
policies.guidelines: Outbound payments above AED 50,000 require dual approval (initiator + authoriser). Payments submitted after 14:00 GST will be processed the next banking day. All beneficiaries must be pre-verified against the FAB approved beneficiary list. OFAC, UN, and EU sanctions screening is mandatory for every payment instruction.

policies.name: UAE Personal Data Protection Law
policies.regulation: UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on Personal Data Protection
policies.guidelines: Personal data may only be processed with documented consent or a lawful basis. Data subjects have the right to request erasure. Cross-border data transfers outside the UAE require TDRA approval or an adequacy determination. Data breaches must be notified to the TDRA within 72 hours of discovery.

policies.name: FAB AI/Model Risk Management Policy
policies.regulation: FAB Model Risk Management Framework (2023) aligned with UAE CBUAE AI Guidance
policies.guidelines: All AI-generated recommendations or decisions affecting customers or finances must undergo human review before execution. Models must produce explainable outputs. Bias and fairness assessments are required at deployment and annually thereafter. Hallucination events (detected by heuristic or LLM-judge) must be logged to the audit trail for model risk review.

policies.name: Finance Folder Access Policy
policies.description: Rules governing access requests to folders containing financial information.
policies.guidelines: Access to the finance folder is strictly regulated. All requests must define the business reason, undergo compliance validation to prevent PII exposure, and obtain explicit manager sign-off via the Approval Gate. Self-granting or direct access is prohibited.

policies.name: Travel and Expense Reimbursement Policy
policies.description: Rules for travel expense submission, pre-approval limits, and auditing.
policies.guidelines: Reimbursements under $500 are automatically approved upon submission of valid receipts (simulated). Any reimbursement request of $500 or higher is considered a high-risk expense and requires formal manager approval through the Approval Gate.

policies.name: General Employee Policies
policies.description: General office hours, remote work guidelines, and general support.
policies.guidelines: Standard office hours are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Remote work eligibility is managed by department leads. Standard inquiries and general support requests are pre-approved and do not require additional gatekeepers.
